ew_context: Price breaking below critical support at 90.44 after 13 touches - corrective structure likely extending lower
pattern_desc: Key level breakdown at 90.44 after extensive testing with 13 touches. RSI at 44.4% supports further downside momentum.
key_levels: Resistance: 90.44 (broken key level), 91.30 (swing high). Support: 87.39, 85.95 (major swing lows)
invalidation: Close back above 90.44 on H4 timeframe would negate the breakdown
market_context: US-Iran tensions creating oil volatility but talks reportedly still on track, supporting downside pressure
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Price has broken below the critical 90.44 level after 13 previous touches, indicating exhaustion of buying interest at this key resistance-turned-support zone. The breakdown occurs with oil trading at 89.62, below both EMA20 (90.58) and EMA50 (90.39), though the EMAs remain bullishly aligned. This creates a conflicted technical picture where short-term momentum is bearish despite the broader uptrend remaining intact.

RSI reading of 44.4% suggests room for further downside without reaching oversold conditions, while ATR of 0.8079 indicates moderate volatility. The laminar flow pattern with momentum alignment supports the directional bias.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 90.44 (broken key level with 13 touches), 91.30 (recent swing high)
- **Support**: 87.39 (swing low target area), 85.95 (major structural support)

## Invalidation Level

Close back above 90.44 on H4 timeframe would negate the breakdown and suggest the level continues to hold as support.

## Macro & Flow Context

US-Iran tensions create headline volatility, but diplomatic sources indicate talks remain on track, limiting sustained upside. CFD physics showing laminar congestion with aligned momentum supports the breakdown thesis below key structural levels.
